name: db_only_phase_wave2_command_bus_cutover
outcome_goal: Model mutations flow through the workflow command bus only, with direct chat, MCP, and control-command shims removed or demoted to explicit compatibility wrappers.
anti_requirements: Do not preserve direct submission shims as the canonical mutation path.
Do not widen into trigger/event or orient runtime work.
Do not remove a compatibility surface without leaving one obvious command-bus authority.

jobs.label: chat_mutation_cutover
jobs.prompt: Resolve `BUG-26DAFEBF` by removing the remaining chat-side direct workflow mutator shim. Chat surfaces may remain front doors, but their mutation path must hand off into the workflow command bus rather than performing first-class writes on their own.

jobs.label: mcp_api_mutation_cutover
jobs.prompt: Resolve `BUG-756CD965` by removing MCP and API direct submission shims that bypass the command bus. Keep the user-facing surfaces intact, but make the command bus the only mutation authority.

jobs.label: control_command_fallback_delete
jobs.prompt: Resolve `BUG-5A3AD7C1` by deleting or explicitly demoting the dead control-command fallback if the control bus remains unbound. The system should fail clearly rather than silently falling back to a second mutation path.

jobs.label: command_bus_proof
jobs.prompt: Add proof coverage that chat, MCP, API, and control-command mutations now converge on one workflow command-bus authority. The proof should catch any surviving direct-write path or fallback that bypasses the bus.
